Rate this app

About

Create decks, study with card flips, spaced repetition. All data saved locally.

Type: Standalone (works offline) · Developer: FreeAppStore

Privacy

Flashcards collects zero data. No analytics, no tracking, no cookies. Nothing leaves your browser.

Open Source

Fully open source under the MIT license. Inspect the code, report bugs, or contribute improvements.
